pagelet.mascot.error: Something went wrong. Try again or send feedback.
pagelet.settings.section.title: Pagelet
pagelet.settings.section.subtitle: Your note's quiet reviewer.
pagelet.settings.beta.callout: Pagelet is in Beta. Suggestions may be imperfect — your feedback helps us improve.
pagelet.settings.general.heading: General
pagelet.settings.model.heading: Model
pagelet.settings.limits.heading: Limits
pagelet.settings.advanced.heading: Advanced
pagelet.settings.enabled.name: Enable Pagelet
pagelet.settings.enabled.desc: Turn the Pagelet reviewer on. When off, the mascot, ribbon, and review commands are hidden.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.name: Reviews folder
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.desc: Vault path where review notes are stored. Defaults to .pagelet (a dotfolder so other plugins skip it).
pagelet.settings.outputLanguage.name: Output language
pagelet.settings.outputLanguage.desc: Language used for review suggestions. Auto follows the note's language; pick a value to force one.
pagelet.settings.ribbonPosition.name: Ribbon position
pagelet.settings.ribbonPosition.desc: Where the Pagelet ribbon icon appears in Obsidian's left bar.
pagelet.settings.temperature.name: Temperature
pagelet.settings.temperature.desc: Model creativity. Lower values produce more deterministic reviews. Range 0.0 to 0.5; default 0.2.
pagelet.settings.maxInputTokens.name: Max input tokens
pagelet.settings.maxInputTokens.desc: Per-review input cap. Default 8000; max 32000. Longer notes are split or refused.
pagelet.settings.maxOutputTokens.name: Max output tokens
pagelet.errors.schema_invalid: Pagelet review failed: the model's response did not match the expected structure. Please try again or send feedback.
pagelet.errors.parse_failed: Pagelet review failed: the model's response could not be parsed. Please try again or send feedback.
pagelet.errors.timeout: Pagelet review timed out. Try again, or shorten the note before retrying.
pagelet.errors.provider_error: Pagelet review failed: the AI provider returned an error. Check your API key, provider, and model in settings.
pagelet.cost.label: Cost
pagelet.cost.limitReached: Pagelet hit the daily call limit. It will resume tomorrow.
pagelet.a11y.announce.done: Pagelet finished reviewing. Suggestions are ready.
pagelet.a11y.announce.error: Pagelet review failed. Open the panel for details.
